_note: expected_total_pins counts pin USE-SITES across all workflows (matches len(collect_sha_pins(...))). allowlist contains UNIQUE (action, sha) tuples — dawidd6/action-download-artifact is pinned at 2 use-sites with the same SHA, hence 3 use-sites / 2 allowlist entries. Offline lookup is by (action, sha) tuple so duplicate use-sites all map to the same allowlist row.

allowlist.note: Initial baseline (T-002). SHA pin because dawidd6 ships only sliding @v<major> tags. Verified via gh api repos/dawidd6/action-download-artifact/commits/<sha>. Pinned at 2 use-sites.
